qwen_omni_config.message0: Configure Tongyi Qianwen API %1 API Key %2 %3 Base URL %4
qwen_omni_config.tooltip: Configure the access key and basic URL of Tongyi Qianwen API

qwen_omni_i2s_speaker_init.message0: I2S speaker init object %1 %2 BCLK %3 LRCLK %4 DIN %5 sample rate %6
qwen_omni_i2s_speaker_init.tooltip: Initialize an I2S speaker output such as MAX98357A and declare the I2SClass object

qwen_omni_i2s_mic_init.message0: I2S microphone init object %1 %2 BCLK %3 LRCLK/WS %4 SD/DOUT %5 sample rate %6
qwen_omni_i2s_mic_init.tooltip: Initialize a standard I2S microphone input such as INMP441 and declare the I2SClass object

qwen_omni_pdm_mic_init.message0: PDM microphone init object %1 %2 CLK %3 DATA %4 sample rate %5
qwen_omni_pdm_mic_init.tooltip: Initialize a PDM microphone input such as the built-in XIAO ESP32S3 Sense microphone. XIAO ESP32S3 Sense defaults: CLK 42, DATA 41

qwen_omni_es8311_mic_init.message0: ES8311 microphone init object %1 %2 SDA %3 SCL %4 address %5 BCLK %6 LRCLK %7 SDOUT %8 MCLK %9 sample rate %10 gain register %11
qwen_omni_es8311_mic_init.tooltip: Initialize ES8311 codec microphone input by configuring the ADC path over I2C, then initializing the I2S recording object. Default address is 0x18 (decimal 24); default gain register is 0x24 (decimal 36)

qwen_omni_es8311_audio_init.message0: ES8311 microphone + speaker init object %1 %2 SDA %3 SCL %4 address %5 BCLK/SCLK %6 LR %7 DI/DAC input %8 DO/ADC output %9 MCK %10 sample rate %11 gain register %12 PA_EN %13
qwen_omni_es8311_audio_init.tooltip: Initialize ES8311 codec microphone and speaker paths for the Microphone + Audio Amplifier board. Defaults from the silkscreen: SCLK 39, LR 2, DI 38, DO 40, MCK46, SDA 41, SCL 42. ES8311 uses 3V3; NS4150B amplifier uses 5V PA_EN defaults to -1 for no control; set a GPIO to drive an external amplifier enable pin high.

qwen_omni_es8311_test_tone.message0: play prompt tone object %1 %2 frequency Hz %3 duration ms %4
qwen_omni_es8311_test_tone.tooltip: Play a short prompt tone through the current I2S/ES8311 speaker object for record start/end cues or speaker checks

qwen_omni_chat.message0: Tongyi Qianwen Dialogue %1 User Message %2 %3 Model %4
qwen_omni_chat.tooltip: Send a message to Tongyi Qianwen and get a reply

qwen_omni_chat_simple.tooltip: Send messages using the default model (qwen3.7-plus)

qwen_omni_chat_with_thinking.message0: Tongyi Qianwen Deep Thought Dialogue %1 User Message %2 %3 Model %4
qwen_omni_chat_with_thinking.tooltip: Tongyi Qianwen dialogue that enables deep thinking mode

qwen_omni_chat_with_history.message0: Tongyi Qianwen Multi-round Dialogue %1 User Message %2 %3 Model %4
qwen_omni_chat_with_history.tooltip: Tongyi Qianwen supports multiple rounds of dialogue and automatically saves the dialogue history.

qwen_omni_set_system_prompt.message0: Set Tongyi Qianwen system prompt word %1 System prompt word %2
qwen_omni_set_system_prompt.tooltip: Set roles and behavior rules for AI assistants

qwen_omni_get_response_status.tooltip: Check if the last API call was successful

qwen_omni_get_error_message.tooltip: Get the error information of the last API call

qwen_omni_set_stream_callback.tooltip: Set the streaming callback function to be executed every time a text fragment is received. Get current fragment content using 'get streaming fragment' block

qwen_omni_get_stream_chunk.tooltip: Get the currently received text fragment in the streaming callback

qwen_omni_clear_stream_callback.tooltip: Clear the set streaming callback function

qwen_omni_vision_chat.message0: Tongyi Qianwen Picture Dialogue %1 Base64 Picture %2 %3 Prompt Word %4 %5 Model %6
qwen_omni_vision_chat.tooltip: Send Base64 encoded images and text to Tongyi Qianwen VL model for image understanding

qwen_omni_vision_chat_direct_capture.message0: Tongyi Qianwen Picture Dialogue (take photos directly) %1 Prompt words %2 %3 Model %4
qwen_omni_vision_chat_direct_capture.tooltip: Take pictures directly from the camera and stream them to Tongyi Qianwen VL (without generating a complete Base64 string, reducing memory usage)

qwen_omni_vision_url_chat.message0: Tongyi Qianwen Picture URL Dialogue %1 Picture URL %2 %3 Prompt Word %4 %5 Model %6
qwen_omni_vision_url_chat.tooltip: Send image URL and text to Tongyi Qianwen VL model for image understanding

qwen_omni_image_generate.message0: Tongyi Wanxiang generated picture %1 Prompt word %2 %3 Model %4 %5 Size %6
qwen_omni_image_generate.tooltip: Generate images based on text descriptions and return image URL links, which can be displayed on TFT screens.

qwen_omni_image_generate_simple.tooltip: Generate pictures based on text description, use default settings, return picture URL link, can be displayed with TFT screen

qwen_omni_tts.message0: Qwen TTS %1 Text %2 %3 Voice %4 %5 Model %6 %7 Language %8
qwen_omni_tts.tooltip: Synthesize speech using Qwen TTS model, returns Base64-encoded PCM audio (24kHz 16bit mono)

qwen_omni_tts_play.message0: Qwen TTS Play Audio %1 Speaker object %2 %3 Base64 Audio %4
qwen_omni_tts_play.tooltip: Decode Base64 audio data from Qwen TTS and play via I2S (24kHz 16bit mono)

qwen_omni_tts_and_play.message0: Qwen TTS Synthesize & Play %1 Speaker object %2 %3 Text %4 %5 Voice %6 %7 Model %8 %9 Language %10
qwen_omni_tts_and_play.tooltip: Synthesize speech with Qwen TTS and play via I2S. Collects full audio then plays for stable quality

qwen_omni_tts_stream_play.message0: Qwen TTS Stream & Play %1 Speaker object %2 %3 Text %4 %5 Voice %6 %7 Model %8 %9 Language %10
qwen_omni_tts_stream_play.tooltip: Stream TTS synthesis with Qwen and play via I2S in real-time. Lower latency, continuous smooth audio

qwen_omni_omni_text.message0: Qwen Omni Chat (Text Only) %1 Message %2 %3 Model %4
qwen_omni_omni_text.tooltip: Chat with Qwen Omni model, returns text reply only

qwen_omni_omni_and_play.message0: Qwen Omni Chat & Play %1 Speaker object %2 %3 Message %4 %5 Model %6 %7 Voice %8
qwen_omni_omni_and_play.tooltip: Omni dialog returns text and audio, decoding while receiving and playing through a small I2S buffer

qwen_omni_omni_stream_play.message0: Qwen Omni Stream & Play %1 Speaker object %2 %3 Message %4 %5 Model %6 %7 Voice %8
qwen_omni_omni_stream_play.tooltip: Omni streaming dialog, text output in real time, audio decoded while receiving and played through a small I2S buffer

qwen_omni_omni_get_audio.tooltip: Get Base64 audio data returned by Omni dialog (use after Omni dialog)

qwen_omni_tts_voice_design.message0: Qwen TTS Voice Design %1 Speaker object %2 %3 Text %4 %5 Voice Description %6
qwen_omni_tts_voice_design.tooltip: Custom voice by text description and synthesize. e.g. gentle young female voice, slightly fast

qwen_omni_omni_voice_chat.message0: Qwen Omni Voice Chat mic object %1 speaker object %2 %3 Record %4 s %5 Model %6 Voice %7 beep %8 %9 Prompt (optional) %10
qwen_omni_omni_voice_chat.tooltip: Record with an independent microphone I2S object and decode/play the response through an independent speaker I2S object while receiving. When beep is checked, one short beep plays at recording start and end. Recording format: 16kHz 16bit mono

qwen_omni_omni_record_text.message0: Tongyi full-mode recording to text Microphone object %1 %2 Recording %3 seconds %4 Model %5 %6 Transcription prompt (optional) %7
qwen_omni_omni_record_text.tooltip: Use the I2S microphone to record and call the Tongyi full-modal model. Only the recognized/translated text will be returned and the voice will not be played. The default recording format is 16kHz 16bit mono

qwen_omni_k10_audio_init.message0: K10 built-in microphone + speaker init object %1 %2 sample rate %3
qwen_omni_k10_audio_init.tooltip: Initialize the UNIHIKER K10 built-in microphone and speaker. Use the same object for both microphone and speaker fields in Qwen voice chat blocks.

qwen_omni_i2s_prompt_tone.message0: play prompt tone object %1 %2 frequency Hz %3 duration ms %4
qwen_omni_i2s_prompt_tone.tooltip: Play a short prompt tone through the current I2S/ES8311 speaker object for record start/end cues or speaker checks
